name: Coney Island Hot Dog Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in a large skillet over medium heat, stirring to crumble it. Drain.
2. Add water and remaining ingredients to the skillet; stir well.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and let the mixture simmer uncovered for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Yield: about 3 cups
